headline: VICI Expands Casino Real Estate Portfolio With $1.6 Billion Golden Deal
summary: VICI adds seven Nevada casino real estate assets as Golden's operating assets move to Blake Sartini and affiliates

raw.headline: VICI Expands Casino Real Estate Portfolio With $1.6 Billion Golden Deal

headline: The Bull Case For VICI Properties (VICI) Could Change Following Raised AFFO Guidance And Deal Acceleration
summary: In the first quarter of 2026, VICI Properties reported revenue of US$1,018.52 million and net income of US$872.39 million, with earnings per share rising versus a year earlier, and complemented this by completing portfolio-expanding deals such as the Golden Entertainment sale-leaseback and the Northfield Park lease transition. By raising its full-year AFFO guidance while committing about US$1.2 billion to new experiential real estate and lending opportunities, VICI Properties signaled how...
